results.title: CATARC Brand Technology Conducts Open Road Verification for TOP Intelligence Smart Anti-Motion Sickness
results.description: TIANJIN, China--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CATARC Brand Technology (Tianjin) Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "CATARC Brand Technology") successfully conducted the verification for TOP Intelligence smart anti-motion sickness. This verification strictly adhered to authoritative protocols and innovatively introduced a dual-dimensional verification system comprising a "bionic dummy for motion sickness" and "user human factors." It integrated the SGS vehicle-level low motion sickness Premium Performance
